sourceTitle: Relevant Policies for the Use of AI Tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Policy on Harassment, Discrimination, and Sexual Misconduct: Prohibits unlawful harassment, discrimination, and sexual misconduct. AI tools may not be used to generate harassing, discriminatory, or otherwise unlawful content. This includes the use of AI to create or alter images, audio, and videos.
evidenceLocator: Policy Crosswalk: Policy on Harassment, Discrimination, and Sexual Misconduct
